heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3521 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Office of Information and Regulatory Affairs to carry out the provisions of this subchapter, and for no other purpose, $8,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1996, 1997, 1998, 1999, 2000, and 2001.
notes: Amendments2002— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 107–198section 3520 of this title2000— substituted “subchapter” for “chapter”.Pub. L. 106–398
